name: Ahmed Abdelrahman
summary: Self-taught software engineer and customer-facing technical problem solver with deep expertise in Node.js, TypeScript, and AI/ML pipelines. At RootCluster, architected a distributed event pipeline processing 1M+ events/hour; at Vogel Edits, shipped customer-facing AI extensions for Adobe products. Combines hands-on full-stack engineering with a collaborative, customer-first approach — ready to serve as the technical bridge between enterprise customers and the Open.cx product. Experienced debugging complex live environments, integrating third-party APIs, and optimizing AI-driven workflows.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Adobe Extensions)
bullets: Delivered customer-facing AI extensions for Adobe After Effects & Premiere Pro, including Vanish BG — a real-time background removal tool — serving as the technical bridge between ML capabilities and end-user production workflows.

Debugged and resolved Adobe's restricted CEP runtime limitations by designing a Node.js sidecar architecture that handles AI inference outside the sandbox, using local HTTP for IPC with real-time streaming.
Built and shipped a TTS Premiere Pro extension using Node.js with local ONNX model inference, owning the full pipeline from text input to rendered timeline clip.
Collaborated directly with designers and stakeholders in an async workflow, triaging customer issues and shipping production-ready tools on agile cycles.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
bullets: Built and integrated a full-stack tourism booking platform using Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js — handling end-to-end implementation from customer-facing UI to backend APIs.
Diagnosed and resolved production performance bottlenecks using PostgreSQL EXPLAIN ANALYZE, achieving sub-100ms API response times under concurrent load.
Integrated Paymob payment gateway with idempotent transaction handling and webhook verification, reducing checkout friction by 40% — directly analogous to enterprise third-party integrations.
Optimized Core Web Vitals to 95+ Lighthouse score, improving customer experience through SSR, image optimization, and lazy loading.

items: AWS (ECS Fargate, ECR, RDS, ElastiCache, Lambda, SSM)

projects.name: RootCluster — AI-Powered Log Analysis Platform
projects.techStack: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL (pgvector), Redis, BullMQ, ONNX, AWS ECS Fargate, Docker, GitHub Actions
highlights: Designed and deployed distributed log ingestion pipeline on AWS ECS Fargate processing 1M+ events/hour with sub-second latency.
Reduced ONNX embedding time from 20+ minutes to under 1 minute via batch processing, Redis caching, and worker autoscaling.
Designed event-driven pipeline: normalize → embed → cluster → merge → root cause, with retries, exponential backoff, DLQs, and idempotent processing.
Implemented centroid-based pgvector clustering to unify cross-service failures into single root causes.
Set up full CI/CD with GitHub Actions OIDC, ECR, SSM Parameter Store, RDS PostgreSQL, and ElastiCache.
Applied PostgreSQL internals (MVCC, isolation levels, indexing) to build high-throughput write pipeline avoiding lock contention.
Leveraged CAP theorem tradeoffs: PostgreSQL for strong consistency, Redis for high-availability caching.

projects.name: Medical CRM — AI-Enhanced Prescription Platform
highlights: Built full-stack CRM handling diagnoses, prescriptions, and patient records for healthcare providers.
Implemented JWT auth with access/refresh token rotation and RBAC across three permission levels.
Designed drug interaction validation across 500+ medications using graph-based PostgreSQL lookup.
Optimized dashboard queries for 10K+ monthly records using composite indexes and window functions.
